data_description.scan_interval: How often to read the PLC state in milliseconds. Minimum 100ms. Setting this too low can overload the connection and cause the integration to stop working.

entities.title: Configure Entities
entities.description:
Enter LOGO! block addresses separated by commas.
Example: {example}

addresses.title: VM Addresses
addresses.description: Set the address, friendly name and optional unique ID for each entity. Address format: byte.bit for digital (e.g. 0.0), byte for analog (e.g. 1032). Leave unique ID blank to use the auto-generated one.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to read the PLC state in milliseconds. Minimum 100ms. Setting this too low can overload the connection and cause the integration to stop working.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to LOGO! at the specified address
error.invalid_entity: Invalid entity address. Use format like NI1, AI3, Q1
error.invalid_address: Invalid address format. Use byte.bit for digital (e.g. 0.0) or byte for analog.

abort.already_configured: This LOGO! device is already configured
